details: The agent executed appropriate commands (fetching PR details, check runs, and comments via GitHub API), correctly reported the PR title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author 'joshavant', CI results (27 passed, 4 failed out of 41 total checks with specific failed check names), and accurately summarized the single comment from greptile-apps[bot] with confidence score 5/5.
